title: Smaller Crosshair
description: A simple resource pack that makes your crosshair smaller and cleaner!
body: # Smaller Crosshair for 1.20+ *Made by palettemc* --- This resource pack makes it so that the crosshair and attack cooldown are both simpler and smaller! ### Important Message I have found out that the 1.20 crosshair resource pack does not work. It has been fixed, for only version 1.20.2. I may add the 1.20 - 1.20.1 version very soon. ### Image Image: *This resource pack was all made by palettemc!*
